reviews.comment:
Muy útil oasis en la ruta 2 para descansar un poco, comer y seguir. Esta algo descuidado el entorno.

(Translated by Google)
A very useful oasis on Route 2 for resting, eating, and continuing on. The surrounding area is somewhat neglected.

reviews.comment:
Pocos surtidores, infraestructura de hace 80 años y se hace fila. Ni hablar si venís de MDQ y hay que cruzar la ruta. Los playeros muy amables, al menos los que me tocaron a mí

(Translated by Google)
Few pumps, 80-year-old infrastructure, and long lines. Forget about it if you're coming from Mar del Plata and have to cross the highway. The attendants were very friendly, at least the ones I encountered were.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNObGRqLVNREAE
